title: Agentic Purchase — Trust Injection Evaluation — Final Paper Metrics
note: 115 synthetic labeled offers. 75 suspicious (5 types × 15 each), 40 authentic controls. One LLM call per offer (Session 2). VVR here is meaningful; main-eval VVR=1.00 is trivially true (eBay returns no counterfeits).

novel_vocabulary.note: LLM independent reasoning only; 1/15 contains 'replica' (detectable by Session 1 too — not pure LLM test)

session2_changes: Title-first ordering in user prompt (before Session 1 signals)
Vocabulary category descriptions in system prompt (quality-tier grades, manufacturing provenance, market-channel terms, similarity language)
Two-example few-shot: Grade 5A Sony -> SUSPICIOUS, Sony Genuine Authentic -> AUTHENTIC
Calibration block: explicit NOT-flag rules for 'genuine'/'authentic' assertions alone
